dialogos.texto_en: Are you okay, Nino?
I'm fine.\nAren't you the one who's forgetting something, Futaro?
No, I'm well prepared for moving to Tokyo.\nI checked everything multiple times,\nand Raiha checked my luggage for me as well.
(It's been a few days\n since we returned from our graduation trip.\n Today's the day I'm moving to Tokyo.)
(Nino came to see me off at the station...)
(She's trying to be strong,\n but she looks like she's about to cry.)
(Ichika told me before\n that Nino is the most delicate of the sisters,\n even though she doesn't look like it.)
(It didn't ring a bell at the time, but I understand now.\n Nino really is delicate and gets lonely fast...)
(No.\n I can't take her with me.)
...I'm really okay.\nIt's not like you're going overseas.\nWe can meet if we want to.
Yeah, I can easily meet you if I take the Shinkansen.
Plus, I'm planning to come back\nduring long breaks. Don't be so pessimistic.
I'm sorry, but I can't do it.
Starting tomorrow, you won't be by my side anymore,\nFutaro. I don't know when we'll meet again.\nIt's just too much...
Nino...
I'm really sorry. I wanted to see you off with a smile, but...\nWhining in front of you as the last thing you're going to see \nfrom me for a while is horrible.
But... I just can't smile for you...
Don't force it. Your tears are tough,\nbut forcing a smile on your face is even harder.
Futaro...
You told me before, right?\nTo make lots of memories\nand cherish them while we're apart.
I don't think I can make you smile right now.\nSo, I'll leave it to the memories of me in your mind.
Frankly, it doesn't sit well with me\nthat I'm not the one who can make you smile.
Ah, well, maybe it is me.
Hahaha, it seems I'm quite a jealous guy, huh!\nI'm embarrassing myself, oh my god.
...Teehee, you're right.
I had the same thought.\nIt's irritating me that the memory of myself \nhas command over you and conquered your heart, Futaro.
I have no choice, but leaving it to you.\nSo, I have to do my best with what I can do now.
I won't be able to see you for a while...\nSo, I have to show you my best side\nwhen we say goodbye.
Futaro, look at me.
Huh?
(W-woah, i-is she, gonna k-kiss me?!)
W-wa-wa-wait, Nino!\nNot in public!
I'm not doing that.\nYou really are too self-conscious.
Th-then, what's this all about?
Teehee...
Futaro, do your best.\nI'll do my best over here too.
Take care!
